channel.title: +Articles on संस्कृत-साङ्गणकाः Sanskrit Programmers
channel.description: Recent content in +Articles on संस्कृत-साङ्गणकाः Sanskrit Programmers

item.title: Hindu 17
item.description: Self-publishing, in an instant S.R. Praveen Thiruvananthapuram February 26, 2017 How visitors to a Kerala book fair walked out with their writing in a publication The cover page of ‘Theruvu’. The cover page of ‘Theruvu’. How visitors to a Kerala book fair walked out with their writing in a publication ‘Publish yourself’ recently assumed a different meaning, when visitors to a street book fair in Thiruvananthapuram turned contributors, their impromptu writings were turned into books as the event concluded.
